decision: Goal is clear, current spec and plan exist, implementation proof is the first unproven lifecycle gate, and the plan has been re-anchored to current partial G1 and F1 state.

Accepted and fixed Sartre sidekick findings on metadata checkpoint. G3 metadata eligibility hardened in a00c6166: metadata now carries role-name availability only, and worker selected/visible demand is allowed only when availableContentRoles is non-empty. Continue with a separate typed content request descriptor; metadata remains handle-free.

G3 typed content request descriptor seam committed at ef23c859. Descriptor is separate from handle-free metadata and carries only evidenced fetch/safe-forward identity fields; live worker fetch and Pierre job prep remain next slices.

G3 worker content fetch prep seam committed at be0ed71d. Worker helper validates typed descriptors, rejects binary/stale resource URLs before fetch, streams text with byte cap, and returns worker-owned bytes. Live demand wiring and Pierre job prep remain next slices.

G3 worker render semantics descriptor seam committed at 54b0d4b3. The worker now has typed item semantic facts separate from fetch descriptors and handle-free metadata; actual Pierre job planning remains next slice.

G3 worker-selected review runtime dispatch committed at a6980bcf. Selected review runtime fetches minimal descriptors, posts prepared Pierre jobs with transfer lists before content-ready patches, and publishes terminal failed/unavailable availability so selected items do not wedge in loading. Continue G3 by moving this worker-core dispatch behind the selected-first WorkerContentPreparationPump before any live Review cutover claim.

G3 worker-selected review prep pump seam committed at 873d6ac8. Selected Review content-ready dispatch is now admitted through WorkerContentPreparationPump as selected-ranked work, stale deferred work is dropped against current selectedId/demand epoch, and select command handling has only an injected deferred-prep scheduler hook while immediate response remains slicePatch + health. G3 worker runtime protocol seam committed at a3190625.
